# Pantry Index

Last updated: 2026-06-07
Book: AI for Learning Experience Design (books/ai-for-learning-experience-design)

Scratch storage for research material feeding `chapters/`. Nothing in
here gets compiled into the book.

## Research notes (generated by Chapter Research Gatherer)

| File | Chapter | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| 01-two-layers-of-change_notes.md | Ch 1 | Two-layer pattern; Bastani three-condition table (verified, PNAS 122(26)); EVER framework; LAUSD "Ed"/AllHere failure case |
| 02-the-crutch-effect_notes.md | Ch 2 | Chess-academy self-regulation finding; Kosmyna EEG cognitive debt with limitations; offloading and desirable difficulties literature |
| 03-the-scaffold_notes.md | Ch 3 | Wood/Bruner/Ross scaffolding; three RCT architectures verified (GPT Tutor, LearnLM/Eedi, Tutor CoPilot); MATHia/WWC evidence |
| 04-reading-the-evidence_notes.md | Ch 4 | SCALE 20-in-800; four-endpoint literacy; Kraft effect-size benchmarks; ESSA tiers; vendor-claim deconstruction; durability gap |
| 05-ai-as-design-partner_notes.md | Ch 5 | Luo et al. 2025; Moore et al. 2025 microlesson A/B (verified n=27); Wadinambiarachchi CHI 2024 fixation experiment; NNG verdicts |
| 06-designing-tutoring-interactions_notes.md | Ch 6 | Hint ladders (VanLehn d≈0.76); GPT Tutor spec details (57 teacher-written prompts); reasoning gates; fading; gaming-the-system |
| 07-adaptive-systems_notes.md | Ch 7 | IRT/BKT/DKT at design depth with worked Bayes example; pacing vs. personalization; Knewton collapse failure case |
| 08-algorithmic-routing-and-equity_notes.md | Ch 8 | Baker & Hawn bias-entry map (verified IJAIED 32); ABROCA auditing; Wisconsin DEWS failure case (74% false alarms); Ofqual 2020 |
| 09-ai-generated-content-and-feedback_notes.md | Ch 9 | Lee & Moore 2024 (verified OLJ 28(3)); 77-study grading review; IRRODL 2024 video-lecturer study (n=108); BABEL/e-rater failure case |
| 10-assessment-redesign_notes.md | Ch 10 | Messick/Kane validity; Corbin/Dawson/Liu (DOI verified); two-lane approach; detection failure (Liang et al. 61.3% TOEFL false positives) |
| 11-trust-transparency_notes.md | Ch 11 | Bhat AIES-25 citation corrections; Lee & See calibration; Schilke & Reimann transparency dilemma; Character.AI litigation timeline |
| 12-agentic-ai_notes.md | Ch 12 | L0–L3 authority ladder; HBR 86%/6% verified; EU AI Act Annex III + Art. 5(1)(f); Instructure IgniteAI and "Einstein" cases |
| 13-ai-literacy-developmental-calibration_notes.md | Ch 13 | Long & Magerko; UNESCO frameworks; OECD-EC AILit draft; SAILD with evidence caveats; five-tier framework critique |
| 14-evaluating-ai-mediated-learning_notes.md | Ch 14 | Four-endpoint evaluation architecture; Withdrawal Test as protocol; subgroup mandate; 2026 unassisted-deficit replication (arXiv preprint) |
| 15-the-full-integration_notes.md | Ch 15 | Integration spec as genre (safety case / model card lineage); negative specification; studio-crit defense; Track A spec build sheet |

## Flags requiring author attention (aggregated from notes files, section G)

1. **Ch 11 citation correction (load-bearing):** "Bhat & Long DIS '24" in the synthesis and TikTOC conflates three papers — affective misinformation is Bhat & Long AIES-25; the n=344 survey is Bhat solo AIES-25. The "four vulnerability vectors" and "Agency Design Framework" names could not be verified; read the AIES PDFs before drafting Week 11 and possibly reword LO1.
2. **Ch 8 "PLĀ" — UNVERIFIED** as a named framework; appears in TikTOC core content. Fix the TOC line or source it before drafting.
3. **Ch 4/7 "+0.04 Cognitive Tutor" — PARTIALLY VERIFIED.** WWC says "mixed effects"; Pane et al. says null year 1 / ~+0.20 year 2. The figure appears in TikTOC Week 4's opening; check the WWC PDF before print.
4. **Ch 7 Cao et al. headline figures (30–50% / 15–25%)** could not be confirmed in the abstract; venue is low-prestige; Week 7 LO3 is built on them — full-text confirmation required.
5. **Ch 2 "Wang et al. 2024 85%" figure comes from n=40** — miscitation hazard; the book should state the sample size.
6. **Ch 2 Kosmyna EEG study:** n=54 preprint with published criticism; keep single-source flag; confirm final venue.
7. **Chess-academy follow-up (Ch 2, 6):** still a working paper — verify publication status before press.
8. **Unpinned citations:** Han et al. 2025 (verified equivalent: Zhang, Deng & Shadiev 2026), Yang & Stefaniak 2025, Kumar et al. 2024, Palani & Ramos 2024, McCormack et al. 2024, Wu et al. 2025, MIT Sloan 2026, Sperling et al. (2024 not 2025) — all flagged in the relevant notes files.
9. **WGU "40%+ can't find the human"** needs verification against the brief's segment breakdown (topline found: 65% overall do know how to escalate).
10. **Track A data package dependency:** Chapters 8, 14, and 15 worked examples depend on the not-yet-built statistics-tutor data/spec package (TikTOC Risk 6 / Feature list).
